🔒 100% private — no upload

Convert HEIC to PNG

Free, private, and instant — right in your browser.

Drag & drop your HEIC files here

🔒 Converted in your browser. Nothing is uploaded.

PNG is a lossless format, so converting HEIC to PNG keeps every pixel of your original photo intact — useful for editing, screenshots, or images with sharp edges and text. As with all VaultConvert tools, the conversion runs entirely in your browser and your photos are never uploaded.

How to convert

  1. Drag your HEIC photos into the box above.
  2. Each photo is decoded locally and re-encoded as lossless PNG.
  3. Download your PNG files.

FAQ

Why choose PNG over JPG?

PNG is lossless and supports transparency, so it is better for editing or graphics. JPG is smaller and better for sharing photos.

Are PNG files larger?

Usually yes — lossless compression means bigger files than JPG, especially for photographs.
